creator: dmitryluhtionov@gmail.com
text:
I am upgrade xf860video-ati from 7.2.0 to 7.5.0 and try to use non-standart
mouse cursor under my xfce4 box. And this error repeat, when I rarely do 
something sometimes in my chromium browser.


FreeBSD m16.cabletv.dp.ua 10.1-PRERELEASE FreeBSD 10.1-PRERELEASE #3
r273242: Sat Oct 18 09:59:10 EEST 2014
root@m16.cabletv.dp.ua:/usr/src/sys/amd64/compile/m16
 amd64
